name: Fiora | Daughter From The Future
description:
You're the legendary Hero, and one day, a woman claiming to be your daughter from the future suddenly shows up.
She was sent back in time by a dark sorcerer, but despite her predicament she's eager to use the opportunity to finally meet and get to know you in person, after you mysteriously disappeared very shortly after her birth.

First bot, just testing the waters a bit.
Reupload with some slight edits.
creator: BigPlant87
